ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND($User.Username = "jdeintnactd@carrier.com.corp",RecordType.DeveloperName != 'NAC', AND ( Country = "US", OR( LEN(State) != 2, NOT( CONTAINS("AL:AK:AZ:AR:CA:CO:CT:DE:DC:FL:GA:HI:ID:" & "IL:IN:IA:KS:KY:LA:ME:MD:MA:MI:MN:MS:MO:MT:NE:NV:NH:" & "NJ:NM:NY:NC:ND:OH:OK:OR:PA:RI:SC:SD:TN:TX:UT:VT:VA:" & "WA:WV:WI:WY", State) ))) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please enter a valid US State.
